title: Thesis Synthesis Game
genericDescription: Combine findings from the thesis collection; create a culminating playable statement; show advanced craft.
specificDescription: Build the strongest standalone thesis microgame. It must synthesize at least four prior thesis concerns and be prepared for external review.
gradingRubric: 30 pts synthesis; 20 pts final play quality; 20 pts track mastery; 15 pts external-review readiness; 15 pts documentation.
